name: PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC
description_short: PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC is a credit repair provider based in Phoenix, Arizona. Rated 3.5/5 with 129 Google reviews, reflecting solid customer satisfaction.
description_long:
PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC is a credit repair provider serving clients in Phoenix, Arizona. With 129 Google reviews and a 3.5/5.0 rating, PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC has built a significant presence in the local credit repair market.

PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC specializes in credit repair services designed to help consumers repair and improve their credit scores. Additional information about their services and processes can typically be found on their website.

When evaluating credit repair services in Phoenix, consumers should look for providers that dispute directly with all three credit bureaus — Equifax, Experian, and TransUnion. Key differentiators include transparency around pricing, realistic timelines for results, and whether the company offers a money-back guarantee. PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC operates in a highly regulated industry under the Credit Repair Organizations Act (CROA), which requires written contracts, a three-day cancellation window, and prohibits upfront fees before services are rendered.

Consumers in the Phoenix, Arizona area who are considering PRESTAMOS CDFI, LLC should contact the company directly to discuss their specific situation and get current pricing information. As with any credit repair provider, it is advisable to compare multiple options, verify licensing and credentials, and read recent customer reviews before making a decision.
